nodes.label: Release Workflow (bun run release via release-it)
nodes.norm_label: release workflow (bun run release via release-it)

nodes.label: Observer-Only Design Principle
nodes.rationale: A control plane is tempting but requires trust burden, surface area, distribution friction. By scoping to observer, the product competes on UX of visibility rather than policy enforcement, giving a cleaner positioning and smaller engineering surface.

nodes.label: Phase Inference Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Superpowers exposes no structured phase state; claude-control infers phase from InstructionsLoaded events and artifact presence on disk. If uncertain, shows 'phase: unknown' rather than guessing.

nodes.label: Hooks API Corrections (command hooks, not HTTP)
nodes.rationale: HTTP hooks are always synchronous — async flag is ignored. FileChanged matcher supports literal filenames only (no globs). SubagentStop uses 'output' not 'last_assistant_message' and 'subagent_id' not 'agent_id'. Use $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA instead of ~/.claude-control/. Resulted in using command hooks (shell scripts) for all events.
nodes.norm_label: hooks api corrections (command hooks, not http)

nodes.label: Story → Spec → Plan Derivation Hierarchy (UX Model)
nodes.rationale: Story/Spec/Plan are treated as three facets of the same story rather than peer views. This drives the sidebar Active Story card, breadcrumb, hierarchy strip, and in-content tabs as four redundant surfaces to teach the model during initial adoption.
nodes.norm_label: story → spec → plan derivation hierarchy (ux model)

nodes.norm_label: docspage — combined spec + plan tabbed view

nodes.label: Incremental Story IDs (US{n} format)
nodes.rationale: Replace date-slug IDs (US-yyyy-MM-dd-slug) with short incremental IDs (US1, US2…). Counter derived from COALESCE(MAX(seq), 0)+1 inside a transaction for safety. Old date-slug IDs continue to work.

nodes.label: Versioning and Release Mechanism (release-it + sync-version.mjs)
nodes.rationale: Root package.json is the single authoritative version. sync-version.mjs propagates it to all derived locations after bump. All packages share one version — no per-package independent versioning.
